title: [MTR] British Rail APT-P Class 370
description: Adds the BR APT-P Class 370 made by Skywalker_6517
body:
This pack adds the British Rail APT-P Class 370 for the MTR mod. It is a tilting train built in Britain with pioneering technology.

**The pack adds different coaches with different variants:**

-Front

-First Class Forwards

-Power Car Forwards (Pantograph Down, 5, 6)

-Power Car Backwards (Pantograph Down, 5, 6)

-Trailer Car

-First Class Backwards

-Back

It is recommended to use this train with the MAGIC MTR addon, which adds tilting mechanisms. Please enjoy!
